name: open_synthetic_memory_relevance_calibration
provenance: Hand-authored synthetic development examples; contains no user, production, or benchmark data.
label_definition: 1 means the memory is applicable to the current request; 0 means it should not influence the response.

levels.L1: Stable global preference or avoidance memory.
levels.L2: Episodic or contextual memory whose scenario must still match.
